overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a mountainous autumn landscape with red rock formations, approaching and navigating around a waterfall, and encountering a mechanical creature. The environment features vibrant fall foliage, mossy rocks, and dramatic cloud-covered mountain peaks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail through autumn forest with red rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail, navigating through autumn foliage and red rock terrain

entered.detail: tall reddish-orange rock face forming the canyon wall
large tree with yellow-orange autumn leaves
winding dirt path through the mountain terrain
distant snow-capped peaks visible through clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through a mountainous autumn landscape. Red rock cliffs rise on the left while trees with vibrant fall colors line the path. In the distance, a dramatic mountain range emerges through the clouds as the camera follows the character's steady forward movement.

events.description: path opens to reveal waterfall and canyon edge ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail toward the canyon edge, approaching the waterfall overlook

entered.detail: striking tree with deep crimson foliage beside the path
tall waterfall cascading down the cliff face into the canyon
rustic wooden fence along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The trail continues toward a dramatic overlook where a waterfall becomes visible in the distance. A large tree with brilliant red leaves dominates the center of the frame as the character approaches the canyon edge. The wooden railing appears along the right side of the path as the ground begins to slope downward toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with mossy rocks and pool

events.description: ground transitions from dirt to moss-covered rocks near the water
mechanical boar creature emerges from behind rocks near the waterfall

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating down the mossy rocks toward the waterfall pool, passing close to the mechanical creature

notable_agents.action: mechanical boar-like machine standing near the waterfall mist, then moving past the character

entered.detail: vibrant blue-green water pool at the base of the waterfall
large rocks covered in green moss forming the path
weathered wooden barrier along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character descends onto moss-covered rocks at the waterfall's base, where the ground becomes slippery and wet. The turquoise pool glows at the bottom of the cascade while mist rises from the falling water. A mechanical boar-like creature emerges from the left, standing near the spray before the character continues past it along the rocky ledge.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy path along stream departing from waterfall

events.description: character turns right to follow the path away from the waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy path away from the waterfall, following the wooden fence line

entered.detail: lush green trail winding through the rocks
narrow waterway flowing from the waterfall pool
continuous wooden railing along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the waterfall, the character follows a grassy path bordered by a wooden fence on the right. The terrain dries out and the sound of falling water fades as the path winds through autumn-colored trees. A small stream runs parallel on the left while the character continues exploring the mountain valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant autumn mountain range that transitions from high cliffside trails down to a misty waterfall and back into a quiet valley. It begins by following the character along a winding dirt path flanked by red rock cliffs and colorful foliage, with dramatic peaks emerging through distant clouds. As the trail reaches a canyon overlook, the camera passes a brilliant red tree and follows a wooden railing that slopes downward toward a distant cascade. The scene then shifts to the waterfall's base, where the character navigates slippery, moss-covered rocks and a glowing turquoise pool while a mechanical boar-like creature emerges from the rising mist. Finally, the camera moves away from the spray and onto a drying grassy path bordered by a wooden fence, winding through autumn trees alongside a small stream as the sound of the falls fades.
